subject: Migrate scheduled invocation to EventBridge Scheduler (remove the 300-rule cap blocker)

classic_rule_audit.note: Orphan-rule reclamation buys one-time headroom but the cap returns as engines are added. EventBridge Scheduler removes the constraint permanently - that is the point of this migration regardless of current headroom.

verdict: EVENTBRIDGE SCHEDULER LIVE - justhodl-dividend-growth now runs daily 13:45 UTC via EventBridge Scheduler (uncapped). The capital-return-daily band-aid is removed, disarming the target1-overwrite bug. Scheduler is the go-forward scheduling path; the 300-rule cap no longer blocks new engines.
